defect: control wiring in same raceway as power
prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is VFDs & motor controls, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: control wiring in same raceway as power. The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: NEC 430, mfr manuals. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: VFDs & motor controls (industrial site)
